name: Agent Control
description: Registers OpenClaw tools with Agent Control and blocks or escalates unsafe tool invocations.

serverUrl.label: Server URL
serverUrl.help: Base URL for Agent Control (example: http://localhost:8000).

agentName.label: Agent Name Prefix
agentName.help: Base name used for OpenClaw agents when registering with Agent Control.

failClosed.label: Fail Closed
failClosed.help: If true, block tool invocations when Agent Control is unavailable.

logLevel.label: Log Level
logLevel.help: Controls plugin verbosity: warn logs only warnings, errors, and block events; info adds high-level lifecycle logs; debug adds verbose diagnostics.

steerBehavior.label: Steer Behavior
steerBehavior.help: Controls how Agent Control steer decisions are handled for tool calls. requireApproval uses OpenClaw approvals, routing exec through native exec approval and other tools through plugin approvals; block rejects immediately.
